blockReason: Visual QA stayed below 95/100 after 3 iterations (best score: 88). Defects: IMPROVE_CONTRAST: The smaller yellow text 'All applicants must have experience...' is low contrast on the background and hard to read.; IMPROVE_SPACING: Crowding in multi-line headline causes slight tension at top of text block.; OTHER: Red underline under 'OIL & GAS - BILFINGER' seems unnecessary and visually distracting, disrupting clean text presentation.; Agency identity appears both at the top (logo small but present near contact) and in the footer, which is redundant in VISUAL_HERO archetype.; The small red underline under 'IN SAUDI ARABIA' looks like a visual defect or accidental graphic that does not add value.; Agency identity is somewhat prominent near the bottom but not duplicated at the top, so no duplication defect.; Slightly dense text in the positions list could use improved spacing for better readability.

defects: IMPROVE_CONTRAST: The smaller yellow text 'All applicants must have experience...' is low contrast on the background and hard to read.
IMPROVE_SPACING: Crowding in multi-line headline causes slight tension at top of text block.
OTHER: Red underline under 'OIL & GAS - BILFINGER' seems unnecessary and visually distracting, disrupting clean text presentation.

requiredCorrections.note: Increase contrast or add stronger scrim behind the small yellow disclaimer text for readability.
Add subtle line spacing or adjust layout in headline block to reduce text crowding and improve clarity for mobile reading.
Remove the red underline beneath the small repeated 'OIL & GAS - BILFINGER' line as it distracts and is inconsistent.
